lines.text: Lake Buena Vista Golf Course | Walt Disney World Resort
Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course
This classic country-club course winds through pastel villas, pine forests, palmettos and sparkling lakes.
Disney’s Lake Buena Vista Golf Course is currently closed for renovations that are expected to continue through fall 2026.

A full greens refurbishment plus irrigation upgrades will be implemented, as well as other key enhancements. During the closure, you may play at either Disney’s Magnolia Golf Course or Disney’s Palm Golf Course as we prepare Disney’s Lake Buena Vista Golf Course for your future enjoyment. For further details, visit Upcoming Enhancements at Disney’s Lake Buena Vista Golf Course.
Throughout the renovations, the Golf Shop will remain open daily from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course has hosted the PGA Tour, the LPGA Tour and USGA events.

Certified by Audubon International as a Cooperative Wildlife Sanctuary and rated an impressive 4 stars by Golf Digest, the 18-hole course was conceived by Joe Lee and most notably features elevated bunkered greens that put a premium on accurate approach shots. Test your skills and fortitude at the demanding 7th hole with its challenging island green.
Walt Disney World Resort golf courses are operated by Arnold Palmer Golf Management.
Learn more about golf carts, proper golf attire and more.

Reserve your tee time online or call the Golf Master Starter at (407) WDW-GOLF or (407) 939-4653, even if it is just a few hours before you plan to play. Though reservations are highly recommended, we try to accommodate walk-up golfers as well. Single or twosome walk-up golfers will have the best chance to play.

Please plan to arrive at least 30 minutes prior to your tee time to allow for check-in, cart assignment and a healthy warm-up. If you are unavoidably detained and arrive late, we will do the best to accommodate you whenever possible.

Tee times must be cancelled, and party sizes must be reduced at least 24 hours in advance to avoid a possible payment penalty. Tee times that are cancelled or left unreduced inside of 24 hours are subject to be charged to the credit card provided when reservations were made. Golfers are encouraged to call the Golf Master Starter at (407) WDW-GOLF or (407) 939-4653 to cancel or modify party size, even if you are inside the 24-hour window. Those who made tee time reservations online may also cancel online.
Guests under 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.

Complimentary transportation via taxi is available to Guests of select Walt Disney World Resort hotels. You may request a ride at the Valet Desk or from Bell Services at select Resort hotels, and in the Pro Shop or from any golf operations staff members at the golf courses. Guests are advised to check with Guest Services or the Concierge for any transportation options offered by their hotel.

Golf Day Guests who wish to arrange their own transportation to the golf courses will find that there is no charge for parking at the golf course itself or when going through the Auto Plaza on the way to the golf courses.

Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course is located near the Disney Springs Marketplace. Take Interstate 4 to exit #68, heading North on Route 535. Turn left onto Hotel Plaza Boulevard. Follow the signs to Disney's Lake Buena Vista Golf Course, located at Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa.
To retrieve directions on a GPS or mapping device, we recommend you input the following address:
Disney’s Lake Buena Vista Golf Course
